text:

  "english": {
    "IsA": [
      "It is a board wargame."
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "It has over 400 counters.",
      "It has two large 22\" x 34\" hex grid maps.",
      "It has a 36-page rulebook.",
      "It has a 24-page scenario book."
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "It is characterized by a scale of 100 m (110 yd) per hex.",
      "It is characterized by gameplay consisting of a series of alternating turns.",
      "It is characterized by clear charts.",
      "It is characterized by army morale being a matter of killed and routed battalions.",
      "It is characterized by specific French counters featuring white instead of blue backgrounds due to an indigo dye shortage.",
      "It is characterized by some terrain markings being ambiguous.",
      "It is characterized by well-balanced and tense gameplay.",
      "It is characterized by innovations."
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "It is used for simulating the Napoleonic-era Battle of Corunna.",
      "It is used for controlling British forces trying to escape from Corunna via the sea.",
      "It is used for controlling French forces trying to destroy the British forces before they can escape.",
      "It is used for learning the rules.",
      "It is used for playing with hordes of cavalry and infantry across open spaces.",
      "It is used for experiencing a different kind of Napoleonic warfare."
    ],
    "LocatedIn": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "BuiltIn": [

    "KnownFor": [
      "It is known for simulating the Battle of Corunna.",
      "It is known for its complexity.",
      "It is known for its historical detail.",
      "It is known for offering a different kind of Napoleonic warfare."
    ],
    "AssociatedWith": [
      "It is associated with the Napoleonic era.",
      "It is associated with the Battle of Corunna.",
      "It is associated with Sir John Moore.",
      "It is associated with Marshal Jean de Dieu Soult.",
      "It is associated with James Princip Beadle.",
      "It is associated with Rick Barber.",
      "It is associated with Ed Wimble.",
      "It is associated with Paul Dangle.",
      "It is associated with Keith Martens.",
      "It is associated with Monte Gray."
    ],
    "NamedAfter": [
      "It is named after the Battle of Corunna."

    "About": [
      "It is about the Napoleonic-era Battle of Corunna.",
      "It is about the future of British involvement in the Peninsular War.",
      "It is about a minor engagement at Piedralonga.",
      "It is about a skirmish for control of the town of Corunna.",
      "It is about the historical battle of Corunna."
    ],

      "It was influenced by the complex game system used in La Bataille d'Auerstadt.",

  "japanese": {
    "IsA": [
      "それはボードウォーゲームです。"
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "それは400以上のカウンターを持っています。",
      "それは2つの大きな22\" x 34\"のヘックスグリッドマップを持っています。",
      "それは36ページのルールブックを持っています。",
      "それは24ページのシナリオブックを持っています。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは1ヘックスあたり100メートル（110ヤード）のスケールを特徴としています。",
      "それは交互ターンの連続で構成されるゲームプレイを特徴としています。",
      "それは明確なチャートを特徴としています。",
      "それは軍隊の士気が殺されたり敗走したりした大隊の問題であることを特徴としています。",
      "それは染料不足のために白い背景を持つ特定のフランスのカウンターを特徴としています。",
      "それは一部の地形マーキングが曖昧であることを特徴としています。",
      "それはバランスの取れた緊迫したゲームプレイを特徴としています。",
      "それは革新を特徴としています。"
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "それはコルーニャの戦いをシミュレートするために使用されます。",
      "それはコルーニャから海経由で脱出しようとするイギリス軍を指揮するために使用されます。",
      "それは脱出する前にイギリス軍を破壊しようとするフランス軍を指揮するために使用されます。",
      "それはルールを学ぶために使用されます。",
      "それは騎兵と歩兵の大群と戦うために使用されます。",
      "それは異なる種類のナポレオン戦争を体験するために使用されます。"
    ],
    "LocatedIn": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "BuiltIn": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "BuiltBy": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "OriginatedIn": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "FoundedBy": [

    ],
    "FoundedIn": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "CreatedBy": [
      "それはJ.トーマス・ベイリーによって作成されました。",
      "それはエド・ウィンブルによって作成されました。"
    ],
    "CreatedIn": [

    ],

    ],

      "不明"
    ],
    "ConsistsOf": [
      "それは騎兵の移動から成ります。",
      "それは機動から成ります。",
      "それは射撃から成ります。",
      "それは白兵戦から成ります。",
      "それは再編成から成ります。"
    ],
    "PartOf": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "MemberOf": [
      "不明"

    "BelongsTo": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "KnownFor": [
      "それはコルーニャの戦いをシミュレートすることで知られています。",
      "それはその複雑さで知られています。",
      "それはその歴史的な詳細で知られています。",
      "それは異なる種類のナポレオン戦争を提供することで知られています。"
    ],
    "AssociatedWith": [
      "それはナポレオン時代と関連があります。",
      "それはコルーニャの戦いと関連があります。",
      "それはジョン・ムーア卿と関連があります。",
      "それはジャン・ド・ディユー・スル将軍と関連があります。",
      "それはジェームズ・プリンシプル・ビードルと関連があります。",
      "それはリック・バーバーと関連があります。",
      "それはエド・ウィンブルと関連があります。",
      "それはポール・ダングルと関連があります。",
      "それはキース・マーテンスと関連があります。",
      "それはモンテ・グレイと関連があります。"
    ],
    "NamedAfter": [
      "それはコルーニャの戦いにちなんで名付けられました。"
    ],

      "不明"
    ],

    "About": [
      "それはナポレオン時代のコルーニャの戦いについてです。",
      "それは半島戦争におけるイギリスの関与の将来についてです。",
      "それはピエドラロンガでの小規模な交戦についてです。",
      "それはコルーニャの町をめぐる戦闘についてです。",
      "それはコルーニャの歴史的な戦いについてです。"
    ],
    "InfluencedBy": [
      "それはアウエルシュタットの戦いで使用された複雑なゲームシステムの影響を受けました。",
      "それは以前に公開されたゲームと後方互換性があるように更新されたルールシステムの必要性の影響を受けました。"
    ],
    "Influenced": [
      "不明"
    ]
  }

HasA: It has two large 22" x 34" hex grid maps.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by a scale of 100 m (110 yd) per hex.
It is characterized by gameplay consisting of a series of alternating turns.
It is characterized by clear charts.
It is characterized by army morale being a matter of killed and routed battalions.
It is characterized by specific French counters featuring white instead of blue backgrounds due to an indigo dye shortage.
It is characterized by some terrain markings being ambiguous.
It is characterized by well-balanced and tense gameplay.
UsedFor: It is used for simulating the Napoleonic-era Battle of Corunna.
It is used for controlling British forces trying to escape from Corunna via the sea.
It is used for controlling French forces trying to destroy the British forces before they can escape.
It is used for learning the rules.
It is used for playing with hordes of cavalry and infantry across open spaces.
It is used for experiencing a different kind of Napoleonic warfare.
CreatedBy: It was created by J. Thomas Bailey.
It was created by Ed Wimble.
ProducedBy: It was produced by Clash of Arms.
KnownFor: It is known for simulating the Battle of Corunna.
It is known for its complexity.
It is known for its historical detail.
It is known for offering a different kind of Napoleonic warfare.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the Napoleonic era.
It is associated with the Battle of Corunna.
It is associated with Sir John Moore.
It is associated with Marshal Jean de Dieu Soult.
It is associated with James Princip Beadle.
It is associated with Rick Barber.
It is associated with Ed Wimble.
It is associated with Paul Dangle.
It is associated with Keith Martens.
It is associated with Monte Gray.
NamedAfter: It is named after the Battle of Corunna.
About: It is about the Napoleonic-era Battle of Corunna.
It is about the future of British involvement in the Peninsular War.
It is about a minor engagement at Piedralonga.
It is about a skirmish for control of the town of Corunna.
It is about the historical battle of Corunna.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the complex game system used in La Bataille d'Auerstadt.
It was influenced by the need for updated rules systems to be backwardly compatible.
